LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE JAN-13-2022 HEARING RE: MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL AS TO DEFENDANT MARYANNE VILLAMIL, THE COURT RULES AS FOLLOWS: MOTION IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR FOR FAILURE OF PARTIES TO APPEAR AT HEARING. MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel As to Defendant Maryanne Villamil.

No appearances made in this matter.

The Court's tentative ruling instructed parties to appear.

The Court rules as follows: Motion is taken off calendar for failure to appear.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, Email: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/RBU)
